mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM orders WHERE user_id = #{userId}
AND status = #{status}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM orders WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND status = #{status}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO orders (order_no, user_id, total_amount, pay_amount, freight, status, address_name, address_phone, address_detail, remark, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{orderNo}, #{userId}, #{totalAmount}, #{payAmount}, #{freight}, #{status}, #{addressName}, #{addressPhone}, #{addressDetail}, #{remark}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE orders SET status = #{status}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE orders SET status = 1, pay_time = NOW(), update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 0
UPDATE orders SET status = 2, ship_time = NOW(), update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 1
UPDATE orders SET status = 2, ship_time = NOW(), logistics_company = #{logisticsCompany}, logistics_no = #{logisticsNo}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 1
UPDATE orders SET status = 3, receive_time = NOW(), update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 2
UPDATE orders SET status = 4, cancel_time = NOW(), update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 0
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM orders WHERE id = #{id} AND status IN (3, 4)
